description: In OpenELIS Global, create a new lab order for a walk-in patient. Navigate to the 'Order' section and select 'Add Order'. Create a new order with the following patient details: First Name: 'Wanjiku', Last Name: 'Njoroge', Date of Birth: '02/19/2001', Gender: Female. For the sample, select 'Serum' as the sample type and request the following tests: 'Glucose' and 'Creatinine'. Submit the completed order. The OpenELIS login credentials are: username 'admin', password 'adminADMIN!'.
